metadata.notes: Complete CAD drawing in DXF format from grellier.fr. French/English bilingual. X-braced construction. Dimensions extracted from DIMENSION entities and MTEXT annotations in DXF.

name: Acoustic Guitar 00
description: Grand Concert body size. Small-body acoustic guitar positioned between the parlor (0) and the 000/OM. Comfortable compact body with focused midrange. Excellent for fingerstyle and recording. Body size similar to Gibson L0/L1 but with X-bracing. Martin-influenced construction.
cam_notes: DXF file available for body outline extraction. Pending CAM generator.

scale.scale_length_note: Standard short scale for 00 format. 24.9 inches. Confirmed from DXF dimension cluster near 633.5mm.

body.lower_bout_width_note: Standard 00 lower bout. DXF dimension 362.1mm extracted — slight variation from nominal 352mm. Use DXF geometry as authoritative.
body.waist_width_note: Estimated from standard 00 proportions. DXF dimension 217.5mm.
body.top_radius_source: top radius: 25 ft — DXF MTEXT annotation
body.back_radius_source: back radius: 15 ft — DXF MTEXT annotation
body.bracing_source: DXF layer 0 brace labels T1-T10 (top) and B1-B4 (back)

top_plate.thickness_source: spruce top 0.1 thick (inches) / table epicea ep. 2.5mm — DXF annotation

back_plate.thickness_source: rosewood back 0.1 thick / fond palissandre ep. 2.4mm — DXF annotation

sides.thickness_source: rosewood sides 0.1 thick / eclisses palissandre ep. 2.4mm — DXF annotation

neck.headstock_veneer_source: rosewood veneer / placage de tete palissandre — DXF annotation

bridge.source: ebony bridge / chevalet ebene — DXF annotation

variants.name: Grellier 00
variants.description: C.Grellier design, version 1.1 March 2008. X-braced, rosewood back/sides, spruce top, mahogany neck, ebony board and bridge.
variants.data_notes: Full DXF available. All material specs, bracing labels, plate thickness, dome radii documented.
